variables.input:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }
| fields status

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] }
| fields category

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact] }
| fields impact

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { level = parsed[level] }
| fields level

fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize count(), by: { location = parsed[location] }
| fields location

0.title: Total Recommendations
0.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| summarize totalCount = count()

1.title: Active
1.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[resultType] == "Active"
| summarize activeCount = count()

2.title: High Impact
2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][recommendationImpact] == "High"
| summarize highCount = count()

3.title: Security
3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] == "Security"
| summarize securityCount = count()

4.title: Cost
4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] == "Cost"
| summarize costCount = count()

5.title: Performance
5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] == "Performance"
| summarize perfCount = count()

6.title: High Availability
6.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| filter parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] == "HighAvailability"
| summarize haCount = count()

7.title: By Category
7.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(impact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] }

8.title: By Impact
8.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(category, array($Category))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact] }

9.title: By Status
9.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory], impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(category, array($Category))
| filter in(impact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { status = parsed[resultType] }

10.title: By Level
10.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory], impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(category, array($Category))
| filter in(impact, array($Impact))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { level = parsed[level] }

11.title: Recommendations Summary
11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    recommendationName = parsed[properties][recommendationName],
    recommendationCategory = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory],
    recommendationImpact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    level = parsed[level],
    location = parsed[location],
    resultSignature = parsed[resultSignature],
    eventTime = parsed[time]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(recommendationCategory, array($Category))
| filter in(recommendationImpact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| sort eventTime desc
| fields recommendationName, recommendationCategory, recommendationImpact, status, level, location, resultSignature, eventTime

12.title: Recommendation Details
12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd
    recommendationName = parsed[properties][recommendationName],
    recommendationCategory = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory],
    recommendationImpact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact],
    status = parsed[resultType],
    level = parsed[level],
    resultDescription = parsed[resultDescription],
    recommendationResourceLink = parsed[properties][recommendationResourceLink],
    recommendationType = parsed[properties][recommendationType]
| fieldsRemove parsed, content
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(recommendationCategory, array($Category))
| filter in(recommendationImpact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| sort timestamp desc
| fields recommendationName, recommendationCategory, recommendationImpact, status, level, resultDescription, recommendationResourceLink, recommendationType

13.title: Timeline of Recommendations
13.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact], level = parsed[level], location = parsed[location]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(impact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| filter in(location, array($Location))
| summarize count = count(), by: { timeframe = bin(timestamp, 1h), category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory] }

14.title: By Location
14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Recommendation"
| parse content, "JSON:parsed"
| fieldsAdd status = parsed[resultType], category = parsed[properties][recommendationCategory], impact = parsed[properties][recommendationImpact], level = parsed[level]
| filter in(status, array($Status))
| filter in(category, array($Category))
| filter in(impact, array($Impact))
| filter in(level, array($Level))
| summarize count = count(), by: { location = parsed[location] }
